testcase.name: TC_PhienSuDungDaoImpl_insert_PhiênMoiHopLe

error.message: java.lang.RuntimeException: com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerException: Violation of PRIMARY KEY constraint 'PK__PhienSuD__2660BFEFE85A3FDB'. Cannot insert duplicate key in object 'dbo.PhienSuDung'. The duplicate key value is (PS07).

testcase.error: java.lang.RuntimeException: java.lang.RuntimeException: com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerException: Violation of PRIMARY KEY constraint 'PK__PhienSuD__2660BFEFE85A3FDB'.
